homeInfo.title: Audio Quality Evaluation
homeInfo.message:
Welcome to this audio quality evaluation test.

You will listen to 11 audio samples and answer 2 questions about each one.
Please use headphones and ensure you are in a quiet environment.

For each question, rate the audio on a scale from 1 (worst) to 7 (best).

Click the button below when you are ready to begin.

questions.name: Sample 1
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: solo acoustic nylon string guitar playing in a fingerstyle Brazilian bossa nova style.

prompts.0: Does this caption contain information that is unrelated to the audio clip? Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, entire caption completely unrelated to the audio clip) to 7 (best, completely related)
prompts.1: How complete is the caption with relation to the audio. Consider mood, genre, and instrumentation descriptions. Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, does not contain information) to 7 (best, contains all relevant musical information)

questions.name: Sample 2
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This folk song features an acoustic guitar playing a steady rhythm to support Rachel Andes's gentle vocals. The simple, easygoing melody creates a relaxed mood that fits well on a casual road trip playlist.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track blends rock and blues influences to create a groovy, upbeat foundation driven by electric guitar, bass, and steady acoustic drums. Melodic layers from the saxophone and keyboard elevate the arrangement, resulting in an energetic vibe ideal for a lively bar or road trip setting.

questions.name: Sample 5
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This segment is a lively, instrumental passage from Igor Stravinsky's 1932 recording of *L'Histoire du soldat*, featuring a spirited violin solo within a septet ensemble. The performance includes a dynamic rhythm driven by brass instruments, woodwinds, and percussion, creating an energetic atmosphere suitable for scenes requiring high intensity. Despite the archival note that the audio quality may be imperfect, the arrangement captures a distinctively upbeat and adventurous mood characteristic of the work.

questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This upbeat techno track features a strong electronic beat driven by synthesizers and digital drums, creating an energetic atmosphere ideal for a nightclub or rave. The music incorporates a male vocal sample within its hypnotic and repetitive rhythm, making it highly danceable for DJ sets. Overall, the piece combines vibrant electronic arrangements with a pulsating groove perfectly suited for party scenes.

The music conveys a passionate theme about love transcending distance, blending melodic guitar work with an uplifting emotional tone. While instrumental elements provide a solid foundation, the presence of vocals adds a human touch to the story of eternal connection.

questions.name: About You
questions.description: Please tell us about your musical background.

fields.label: How many years of musical experience do you have?
Please describe your musical experience (instruments played, training, listening habits, etc.)
fields.placeholder: e.g. I've played piano for 10 years and studied music theory in college...
